description_en: Chengdu may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 8 halal restaurants and 2 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Chengdu, China, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Chengdu: 8+ halal restaurants, 2 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
